title: Crispy Sweet Potato Hash
description: A Chinese-inspired side dish made with crispy sweet potato and hash browns.
instructions: Peel the sweet potatoes and cut them into small cubes.
Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the sweet potato cubes and cook for 5 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Add the hash browns and cook for another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce, sesame oil, sugar, and garlic powder.
Pour the mixture over the sweet potatoes and hash browns, and stir to combine.
Continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes, or until the mixture is crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot and garnish with sesame seeds and chopped scallions if desired.
